title: senecio pyrenaicus
intro: Senecio pyrenaicus, also known as Pyrenean ragwort or Pyrenean groundsel, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Pyrenees mountain range between France and Spain. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Senecio pyrenaicus include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio pyrenaicus are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
